mapper.insert: INSERT INTO order_payment (order_id, user_id, merchant_id, runner_id, amount_cents, status, idempotency_key, paid_at, created_at, updated_at) VALUES (#{orderId}, #{userId}, #{merchantId}, #{runnerId}, #{amountCents}, #{status}, #{idempotencyKey}, #{paidAt}, NOW(), NOW())
mapper.update: UPDATE order_payment SET status = #{status}, updated_at = NOW() WHERE id = #{id}
